failure_modes.cause: Local cooling in dead zones or impurities causing crystallization of TBAB/EG
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-traced transfer lines and pre-heating of feed stocks

failure_modes.cause: Extremely low flow rate (0.0667 mL/min) leading to pump slip or pulsation
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pulse dampener or use a high-precision syringe pump

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged residence time (125.8 min) at 120°C causing solvent decomposition
failure_modes.mitigation: Perform TGA/DSC on DES to confirm stability over 2-hour window

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage due to DES crystallization stops all flow
Pump seal — failure at low Q leads to loss of pressure and flashing
validation_experiments: Stability test: Circulate pure TBAB/EG at 120°C for 4 hours; analyze via NMR/HPLC for degradation products
Flow precision test: Measure actual output volume over 10 hours at 0.0667 mL/min to quantify pump slip
Clogging stress test: Cycle temperature from 120°C to 25°C and back to verify solubility and BPR clearance
